scope: Representative executable lock for every correctness lesson carried forward from paused WP1 and WP2.
limitations: This supporting E2 gate does not close normative catalogue rows.
It is not the exhaustive state-class by boundary Cartesian matrix required by section 10.3.
Broader lifecycle, debugger, watchpoint, device replay, and repeated-migration coverage remains in construction step 15.

probes.assertion: AR.ITC is sampled per instruction across helper, stop, memory, and branch boundaries without stale SSA reuse.
AR.PFS moves retain exact architectural, predication, fault, typed-IR, and migration behavior.
Same-group compare results forward to direct branches while false-predicated and stopped variants preserve exact state.
A synchronized code-page store invalidates translated code and resumes at the correct architectural boundary.
Open issue groups retain immutable entry state and typed forwarding across translator-created TB boundaries.
A fresh destination process restores and resumes a live open IA-64 issue group over TCP migration.
The I/O recompile path commits the prefix and performs each architecturally executed MMIO transaction exactly once.
GR values and NaT state obey exact propagation, predication, speculation, spill/fill, and fault behavior.
Plugin, fixed-icount, record, and replay executions produce the same exact architectural result and valid observations.
A slot-1 fault publishes every successful prior bundle and slot while suppressing the faulting instruction and suffix.
RI=2 restart skips earlier non-idempotent slots and executes the application-register operation once.
Return branches preserve exact CFM, PFS, RSE, NaT, predication, fault, and typed-lowering behavior.
Save/load into a fresh QEMU preserves exact open-epoch entry images, forwarding provenance, GR values, and NaT state.
Timer and external interrupt delivery preserve exact saved state, priority, pending state, and RFI continuation.
